creator: ice@extreme.hu
text: It somehow doesn't seem to be specidic to a DE/WM. I have tried with a fresh, no-customisations whatsoever user (except for .xinitrc starting the WM) with no custom X config (nothing in etc/X11/xorg.conf.d/, no xkb config, no custom Xresources, no nothing) with both Window Maker and mwm, with exactly the same results.
